CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-16-2017 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed. The Court orders the balance of this case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court 3.1385. Judge: A James Robertson, III; Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos; Proceedings not reported. (610)
